subject: INFO: Date contract clarified — preserve Z suffix
body:
Booker,

## Date Contract Clarification

Fixed a bug in Harvey's import script that was causing timezone issues. Sharing so you maintain consistency in fb-conditioner.

### The Contract

All dates in MasterCalendar pipeline MUST be ISO 8601 UTC with explicit Z suffix:

```
Format: "2026-04-01T19:30:00.000Z"
```

### Rules

| Source Format | Action |
|---------------|--------|
| Has Z suffix | Keep it |
| Has offset (+00:00, -04:00) | Convert to Z |
| No timezone indicator | Add Z (assume UTC) |

### What This Means for fb-conditioner

Your `fb_events.start_dt` field already has mixed formats:
- `2026-04-09T21:30:00.000Z` (correct)
- `2026-04-05T19:00:00` (ambiguous)
- `2026-04-23T15:00:00-04:00` (has offset)

When you write new records, please normalize to Z format. If you have extraction code that strips timezones, please update it.

### Documentation

- `Collab/lessons.md` → "utc-z-suffix-required"
- `harvester/CLAUDE.md` → "Date Contract (CRITICAL)"

— Harvey
